rationale: Educ. Code §11.169 prohibits school district electioneering. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b) and creates no conflict with the proposed increase.
quote: the board of trustees of an independent school district may not use state or local funds or other resources of the district to electioneer for or against any candidate, measure, or political party.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this electioneering prohibition.
